meta.title: Bootsy Conversation
meta.description: Bootsy offers grounding wisdom at the bar. The only person here not performing.

nodes.speaker: bootsy
nodes.text: You do not have to become the loudest version of yourself just because the room is hard of hearing.

choices.text: You got anything wise and devastating for free?
You putting me up or am I haunting decorative corners all night?
What does this place do to people?

nodes.speaker: bootsy
nodes.text: Free? Nothing's free. But here — this one's underpriced: the room doesn't care about your past. It only cares about the next four minutes. So make them count and stop rehearsing your apology.

nodes.speaker: bootsy
nodes.text: Now go. Before I start charging.

nodes.speaker: bootsy
nodes.text: I've put you on the list. Not the good list. The list that means you're tolerated pending evidence of usefulness.

nodes.speaker: bootsy
nodes.text: The bar's open. The stage is later. Everything between now and then is your problem.

nodes.speaker: bootsy
nodes.text: The one smiling like they've already renamed you, and the one glaring like they preferred the earlier draft.

nodes.speaker: bootsy
nodes.text: Everyone else is just scenery with opinions. You'll be fine as long as you remember which one you are.

nodes.speaker: bootsy
nodes.text: Same thing every room does. It offers them a louder costume and waits to see if they thank it.

nodes.speaker: bootsy
nodes.text: The trick is knowing the difference between the costume and the skin. Most people here stopped checking years ago.
